Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.SearchHit

Packages that use SearchHit
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.suggest.response

  • Uses of SearchHit in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core

    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type SearchHit in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    SearchHits<T>
    Encapsulates a list of SearchHits with additional information from the search.
    interface 
    SearchHitsIterator<T>
    A SearchHitsIterator encapsulates SearchHit results that can be wrapped in a Java 8 Stream.
    interface 
    SearchPage<T>
    Page definition for repositories that need to return a paged SearchHits.
